description: Determines additional spectacular visual or sensory effects for spells. Roll 1d10, 2d10, or 3d10 based on Powerful results.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines additional spectacular visual or sensory effects for spells. Roll 1d10, 2d10, or 3d10 based on Powerful results.

entries.result: Casting of the spell creates an eerie, unnatural sound

resultTranslations.en: Casting of the spell creates an eerie, unnatural sound

entries.result: The spell creates an unusual odor

resultTranslations.en: The spell creates an unusual odor

entries.result: The spell is accompanied by a radiant burst of light or energy

resultTranslations.en: The spell is accompanied by a radiant burst of light or energy

entries.result: The spell creates a rainbow of colors

resultTranslations.en: The spell creates a rainbow of colors

entries.result: The spell raises or lowers the temperature in the vicinity to a noticeable degree

resultTranslations.en: The spell raises or lowers the temperature in the vicinity to a noticeable degree

entries.result: The spell sparks an emotion in those witnessing it, such as dread or joy

resultTranslations.en: The spell sparks an emotion in those witnessing it, such as dread or joy

entries.result: The spell has an additional, unintended effect

resultTranslations.en: The spell has an additional, unintended effect

entries.result: The spell causes nearby animals to behave strangely, such as birds to caw or dogs to bark

resultTranslations.en: The spell causes nearby animals to behave strangely, such as birds to caw or dogs to bark

entries.result: Choose the most dramatic effect from 1-8 for this context

resultTranslations.en: Choose the most dramatic effect from 1-8 for this context

entries.result: The area around the cast spell darkens ominously and unnaturally

resultTranslations.en: The area around the cast spell darkens ominously and unnaturally

entries.result: Temporary and shifting phantasmal shapes form around the casting of the spell. It could be people, places, creatures, or things

resultTranslations.en: Temporary and shifting phantasmal shapes form around the casting of the spell. It could be people, places, creatures, or things

entries.result: Objects in the vicinity of the spell levitate or move

resultTranslations.en: Objects in the vicinity of the spell levitate or move

entries.result: Those near the casting hear whispering in their heads

resultTranslations.en: Those near the casting hear whispering in their heads

entries.result: The spell causes the caster to take on a temporary altered form, such as appearing as an animal or a pillar of fire

resultTranslations.en: The spell causes the caster to take on a temporary altered form, such as appearing as an animal or a pillar of fire

entries.result: Choose the most dramatic effect from 1-15 for this context

resultTranslations.en: Choose the most dramatic effect from 1-15 for this context

entries.result: The spell unfolds with a spectacular display of colors and shifting geometric shapes

resultTranslations.en: The spell unfolds with a spectacular display of colors and shifting geometric shapes

entries.result: Whatever the spell does, double its effects and intensity

resultTranslations.en: Whatever the spell does, double its effects and intensity

entries.result: Come up with the most bizarre and unusual display you can think of that this spell creates when cast

resultTranslations.en: Come up with the most bizarre and unusual display you can think of that this spell creates when cast

entries.result: The spell casts with an angelic chorus and a cracking open of the heavens, as if the world is ending

resultTranslations.en: The spell casts with an angelic chorus and a cracking open of the heavens, as if the world is ending

entries.result: Choose the most dramatic effect from 1-24 for this context

resultTranslations.en: Choose the most dramatic effect from 1-24 for this context
